# Elixir Drop Releases

<!-- elixir-drop-release: -->
## Radiant Royal Giant — 2026-07-24 (f4209ccfb7e9)

Radiant Royal Giant is Elixir Drop's first named release. Like the Royal Giant, it arrives with unmistakable presence: the early practice prototype has grown into a complete, polished game built for learning every elixir cost, chasing personal progress, and competing with the POAP KINGS community.

### The story

Drop now has a full learning loop. You can practice at your own pace, sprint against the clock, compare cards, solve trades, survive shrinking timers, or catch falling cards in Rain. Signed-in runs are dealt and scored by the server, learning progress follows your account, and ranked boards stay separate from unranked Practice.

The experience around the games grew up too. Magic-link accounts, player profiles, seasonal personal bests, Player XP, and a 28-arena journey give every session somewhere to go. A redesigned mobile and desktop shell keeps the games front and center, while install support makes Drop feel at home on a phone.

### Features

- Six distinct ways to learn elixir costs: Surge, Practice, Higher / Lower, Trade, Survival, and Rain.
- Server-dealt challenges, validated results, season and all-time leaderboards, and a live recent-activity feed.
- Magic-link accounts with a favorite-card identity, player profiles, recent runs, and shareable public names.
- Player XP for every question attempted and a 28-tier arena journey that rewards practice without changing skill-based rankings.
- Season bests and mode champions on Home, plus coaching that points Practice toward weak elixir bands.
- Installable mobile PWA support, desktop keyboard controls, responsive layouts, reduced-motion support, and optional sound and enhanced effects.
- Share-ready results, About / FAQ / Install pages, and the hidden Elixir Rain card screensaver.

### Release Notes

- Polished game feedback across every mode with stable overlays, visible penalties, answer cues, celebrations, and preloaded card art.
- Improved mobile login and cross-context PWA sign-in so a magic link opened in the browser can finish login in the installed app.
- Made score sharing more prominent and corrected leaderboard display names and zero-score entries.
- Fixed Rain's delayed first drop, screensaver dismissal timing, mobile email layout, countdown alignment, and wide-screen spacing.
- Mirrored the complete card-art catalog for faster, more reliable play and screensaver rendering.
- Added robust production checks and broad automated coverage across game flows, accounts, profiles, API scoring, responsive layouts, and browsers.
- Connected redeemed accounts to the dedicated Drop release newsletter while preserving unsubscribe choices, and repaired the deployment path so that connection remains configured.
- Corrected analytics for hash-routed pages so visits to Drop's screens are counted accurately.

_Release range: repository history through HEAD._

Named releases tell the story of what has shipped to Drop players.
